Competency probe: Reconcile discovered, fetched, parsed, extracted, admitted, rejected, duplicated, and reported counts.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Quality Reconciliation model · Theory Quality Re…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A large output row count proves high data quality.
